calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diane Fong for Petitioner.

Ms. Fong stated that there are no objections what so ever. The Court granted the Petition for Order Determining Title to Real and Personal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clare Springs and Diane Fong for Surma Mauro.

The Court explained the notice requirement, and stated that it was prepared to conclude that there was effective notice for the one Party located out of State but that service by mail was not effective for those Parties located in State. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Real and Personal Property was continued to November 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on defective notice.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
